# Most Viewed Today — Full Content

> A YouTube trending tracker that ranks the most viewed videos and Shorts worldwide, refreshed roughly every 30 minutes from live YouTube Data API snapshots.

Generated: 2026-06-18

---

---
title: "Global YouTube Trending Leaderboard"
description: "All-categories leaderboard of the most viewed YouTube videos right now, with tabs for top categories and trending Shorts."
url: "https://mostviewed.today/"
site: "Most Viewed Today"
type: "leaderboard"
data_refresh: "Rankings are refreshed roughly every 30 minutes from live YouTube Data API snapshots; Shorts and country/trending data refresh on their own faster or hourly cycles."
generated: "2026-06-18"
---

# Global YouTube Trending Leaderboard

All-categories leaderboard of the most viewed YouTube videos right now, with tabs for top categories and trending Shorts.

This is a live, continuously updated leaderboard page on Most Viewed Today (https://mostviewed.today). Numbers on this static summary are not live — view the canonical URL below for current rankings, view counts, and timestamps.

Canonical page: https://mostviewed.today/

type: "leaderboard"
data_refresh: "Rankings are refreshed roughly every 30 minutes from live YouTube Data API snapshots; Shorts and country/trending data refresh on their own faster or hourly cycles."
generated: "2026-06-18"
---
